    Download CV (PDF)

    Research Interests

    Game theory, network economics, contest theory, public goods provision, industrial organization, political economy.

    Education

    Ph.D. in Development Studies 2023 – Present
    Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research (IGIDR), Mumbai
    Advisor: Prof. Shubhro Sarkar

    M.A. in Economics 2021 – 2023
    Centre for Economic Studies and Planning (CESP), Jawaharlal Nehru University

    B.A. in Economics 2017 – 2020
    St. Xavier’s College, Ranchi University

    Working Papers

    • Pricing, Technology, and Enforcement in Markets with Digital Piracy: A Hotelling Approach (with Prabhat Sahu)
      Target journal: International Journal of Industrial Organization

    Publications

    Currently none.

    Conference Presentations

    • Competitive Altruism in Public Goods Provision
      ICEPAD 2026, BITS Pilani Goa Campus.

    • Pricing, Technology, and Enforcement in Markets with Digital Piracy: A Hotelling Approach
      Crossroads 2026, CDS, Trivandrum.

    • Pricing, Technology, and Enforcement in Markets with Digital Piracy: A Hotelling Approach
      Young Scholars Conference 2025, CESP, JNU.

    Teaching

    Served as Teaching Assistant for the course Mathematics for Economist, Microeconomics II and Macroeconomics I

    • Typesetting: LaTeX
